testcase.name: 0001. SQLi at /api/v1/users
testcase.failure:
Target: https://acme.example.com CWE: CWE-89 CVSS: 9.8 OWASP: A05
UNION-based SQLi via id parameter.

testcase.name: 0002. Reverse shell PoC in /upload
testcase.failure:
Target: https://acme.example.com CWE: CWE-78 CVSS: 8.6 OWASP: A01
File upload allows RCE; PoC included.

testcase.name: 0003. GitHub PAT leaked in JS bundle

failure.message: [HIGH] [CVSS:7.5] GitHub PAT leaked in JS bundle

testcase.failure:
Target: https://acme.example.com CWE: CWE-200 CVSS: 7.5 OWASP: A04
ghp_* token observed in /static/app.js.

testcase.name: 0004. Missing security headers
testcase.failure:
Target: https://acme.example.com CWE: CWE-693 OWASP: A02
No CSP / HSTS / X-Frame-Options.

testcase.name: 0005. MySQL root password observed in CI script
testcase.system-out:
[LOW] MySQL root password observed in CI script Target: https://acme.example.com
Hardcoded password in deploy script.
